---
title: "STAT380_MP2"
author: 
- name: Isaac Swope
- name: Andrew Loiselle
date: "2026-03-31"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Front Matter
```{r}
# Libraries
library(readxl)
# Functions

# Data
games_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Swopei/STAT380-MP2_repo/main/Data/CODGames2_mp.xlsx"
games_tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".xlsx")
download.file(games_url, destfile = games_tmp, mode = "wb")
Games <- read_excel(games_tmp)
```



## Task 1


## Task 2: Variable Exploration


## Task 3: Variable Relations


## Task 4


## Task 5
